query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS handTags (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  handId INT NOT NULL,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  tag VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  color VARCHAR(7) DEFAULT '#3b82f6' NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_handId (handId),
  INDEX idx_userId (userId),
  INDEX idx_tag (tag)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3S5EK7kkwn3cfqa.root --database g6HPzuQNwUJzsGs4mHVNkx --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS handTags (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  handId INT NOT NULL,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  tag VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  color VARCHAR(7) DEFAULT '#3b82f6' NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_handId (handId),
  INDEX idx_userId (userId),
  INDEX idx_tag (tag)
);
